Banner Stand Replacement Material for Indoor Display Applications

Update your indoor display stands with premium replacement banners designed for professional indoor environments. Our replacement banners are printed on high-quality vinyl and fabric materials specifically engineered for banner stand systems.

Vinyl Replacement Options:

  • 13oz scrim vinyl with woven fiber reinforcement for enhanced durability
  • 15oz premium scrim vinyl for heavy-use indoor applications
  • Smooth retraction and extension for repeated use in banner stands

Fabric Banner Soft Material:

  • Matte finish fabric with vibrant color reproduction
  • Hot knife cut edges to prevent fraying during retraction
  • Lightweight material ideal for portable indoor stands

Available Replacement Sizes:

Rotatable Stand Sizes:

  • 36" x 62" (can rotate to 62" x 36")
  • 36" x 78" (can rotate to 78" x 36")
  • 40" x 75" (can rotate to 75" x 40")
  • 48" x 72" (can rotate to 72" x 48")

Versatile Banner Stand Sizes:

  • 72" x 24"
  • 72" x 36"
  • 90" x 36"

Custom sizing available for specific indoor banner stand requirements. Contact customer service for precise measurements and specialty applications.

Three Design Options Available:

  1. Choose from professional templates and customize online
  2. Upload your print-ready artwork files
  3. Work with our design team for custom banner creation

Request material samples to evaluate quality and finish options for your indoor display needs.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Material Options for Indoor Display Stands

Premium Scrim Vinyl Replacements

Our vinyl replacement banners feature high-quality scrim construction with woven fiber reinforcement inside the material. This construction provides:

  • Enhanced strength and durability for repeated retraction cycles
  • Smooth operation in banner stand mechanisms
  • Available in 13oz and 15oz weights
  • Professional appearance suitable for trade shows and retail environments

Banner Soft Fabric Material

Our fabric replacement option offers premium indoor display characteristics:

  • Matte finish reduces glare under indoor lighting
  • Vibrant color reproduction for impactful messaging
  • Hot knife cut edges prevent fraying during banner stand operation
  • Lightweight construction for portable display systems

Material Selection Guidelines:

  • Vinyl: Best for high-traffic environments and frequent banner changes
  • Fabric: Ideal for premium presentations and photography-sensitive environments
  • Both materials compatible with standard indoor banner stand systems

Precision Sizing:

If your replacement banner requires exact dimensions for proper stand operation, our customer service team can accommodate specific measurements. Contact us at 1-866-419-SIGN for precise sizing requirements.

Material samples available for quality evaluation before placing your replacement banner order.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Replacement Finishing Options for Indoor Stand Systems

Standard Replacement Banner Finishing

  • Precision cutting to exact banner stand specifications
  • Hot knife edge sealing for fabric materials to prevent fraying
  • Clean edges for smooth retraction operation
  • Professional corner finishing for banner stand compatibility

Print Quality Options

  • High-resolution digital printing for sharp text and graphics
  • Full-color printing capabilities across entire banner surface
  • UV-resistant inks for indoor display longevity
  • Color-matched printing for brand consistency

Banner Stand Compatibility Features

  • Proper weight distribution for stable display
  • Material thickness optimized for smooth retraction mechanisms
  • Edge finishing prevents jamming in banner stand systems
  • Compatible with both rotatable and versatile banner stand types

Quality Control Process

  • Pre-production file review to ensure proper sizing
  • Print quality inspection before shipping
  • Banner stand fit verification for standard sizes
  • Color accuracy checking for brand compliance

Special finishing requirements for unique banner stand systems can be accommodated. Contact our production team for custom finishing specifications.

Custom Banner Replacement Production & Turnaround Times

Choose flexible production timeframes to meet your indoor display schedule requirements:

1 Business Day Priority Production

  • Fastest turnaround for urgent banner stand updates
  • Ideal for last-minute trade shows or events
  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST processed next business day
  • Emergency same-day options available - contact customer service

2 Business Days Express Production

  • Quick turnaround with additional quality review time
  • Perfect balance of speed and precision
  • Allows for minor artwork adjustments if needed
  • Popular choice for planned display updates

3 Business Days Standard Production (Most Popular)

  • Free standard production timeframe
  • Comprehensive quality control process
  • Suitable for most indoor banner stand replacement needs
  • Allows time for proof review and approval

5 Business Days Saver Production

  • Cost-effective option for advance planning
  • Reduced pricing for longer production window
  • Ideal for bulk replacement banner orders
  • Maximum quality control and review time

Production Timeline Notes:

  • Production starts when artwork upload is complete
  • Proof approval required before production begins
  • Prepress review may extend timeline if artwork issues are found
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time

Contact customer service at 320-391-5300 for specific deadline requirements or rush order availability.

Banner Replacement Payment & Ordering Options

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover credit cards
  • Business and personal checks (must clear before production)
  • Purchase orders accepted - contact customer service for setup
  • Credit card processing after proof approval

Payment Processing Timeline

  • Payment required before banner replacement production begins
  • Credit cards charged only after artwork proof approval
  • Check payments must be received and cleared before production
  • Purchase order terms available for qualified business accounts

Order Requirements

  • Minimum order value: $35.00 in products
  • No setup fees for standard replacement banner sizes
  • Custom sizing may require additional charges
  • Volume discounts available for multiple replacement banners

Proof and Approval Process

  • Digital proof provided via email before production
  • Production begins only after customer approval
  • Changes can be made during proof review stage
  • Color match proofs available for critical color applications

Business Account Options

Purchase orders and business terms available for qualified accounts. Contact customer service at 320-391-5300 to establish business payment options for recurring banner replacement needs.

All orders processed securely with payment verification before production begins.

Shipping Options for Custom Banner Stand Replacements

Production Facilities

Your banner replacement will be produced at our Minnesota or Las Vegas facility, selected for optimal delivery time and cost based on your location.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Economy Shipping: 5-10 business days delivery
  • Standard Ground: 3-5 business days delivery
  • Three Day: 3 business days delivery
  • Two Day Express: 2 business days delivery
  • Overnight: 1 business day delivery
  • Freight: Available for large or bulk orders

Shipping Coverage

  • 1-3 day ground delivery available to 90% of the United States
  • Shipping costs calculated by package weight and destination
  • Additional charges apply for oversized banner replacements
  • Tracking number provided when shipment is processed

Banner Packaging Guidelines

  • Standard replacement banners shipped rolled in protective tubes
  • Large banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions may be folded
  • Fabric banners packaged to prevent creasing and damage
  • Protective packaging ensures banner stand compatibility upon delivery

Special Shipping Considerations

  • Economy shipping: Include P.O. Box information in "Address Two" field
  • International shipping: Customer-provided labels and customs documentation required
  • USPS and UPS labels accepted for international shipments
  • Lost package replacement after shipping company confirms loss (7-10 business days)

Delivery Protection

  • Damaged goods must be returned for replacement processing
  • All shipping company terms apply after package leaves our facilities
  • Recommend early ordering to account for potential shipping delays

Contact customer service at 320-391-5300 for international shipping quotes or special delivery requirements.

Banner Replacement Artwork Requirements for Indoor Stand Printing

Optimal File Formats

  • Best: .eps files converted to outlines
  • Acceptable: High-resolution .pdf, .tif, and .jpg formats
  • Resolution: 300 DPI or higher for crisp banner stand display
  • File Size: Up to 60 MB for online upload

Banner Stand Artwork Specifications

  • Artwork dimensions must match exact banner replacement size
  • Include 0.25" bleed area around all edges for trimming
  • Keep important text and graphics 0.5" from banner edges
  • Consider banner stand viewing distance when sizing text and graphics

Large File Handling

For artwork files larger than 60 MB, contact our customer service team at 320-391-5300 for upload instructions and fastest processing options.

Professional Design Assistance

  • Graphic design team available for custom banner creation
  • Artwork quality review and optimization services
  • Brand guideline compliance checking
  • File format conversion and preparation assistance

Proof Options

  • Standard Proof: Low-resolution digital preview via email
  • Order Proof: Includes artwork, order summary, and billing information
  • Color Match Proof: Physical proof for color-critical applications
  • Production begins only after customer proof approval

Color Considerations for Indoor Display

  • RGB color mode recommended for vibrant indoor display colors
  • CMYK color profiles accepted with slight color variation expected
  • Pantone color matching available through Color Match Proof system
  • Consider indoor lighting conditions when selecting color schemes

Artwork Review Process

  • Pre-production quality check for all uploaded artwork
  • Resolution and sizing verification for banner stand compatibility
  • Text readability assessment for indoor viewing distances
  • Color accuracy review and adjustment recommendations

Unsure about your artwork quality? Our professional graphic designers can review your files and provide optimization recommendations for optimal banner stand display results.

Contact customer service at 320-391-5300 or [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#7b08) for artwork assistance and file preparation guidance.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Replacement Questions & Answers

What banner replacement material works best for indoor stands?

For indoor banner stands, both our 13oz/15oz scrim vinyl and Banner Soft fabric materials work excellently. Vinyl offers durability for frequent banner changes and high-traffic environments. Fabric provides a premium matte finish ideal for photography-sensitive locations and upscale presentations. Both materials are designed for smooth retraction and extension in banner stand mechanisms.

Can I upload my own artwork for banner stand replacements?

Yes, you can upload your print-ready artwork files directly. We accept .eps (preferred), .pdf, .tif, and .jpg formats up to 60 MB. For larger files, contact our customer service team for upload instructions. All uploaded artwork receives a professional quality review, and we provide digital proofs for approval before production begins.

How long does replacement banner production take?

We offer flexible production timeframes: 1 Business Day Priority, 2 Business Days Express, 3 Business Days Standard (most popular and free), and 5 Business Days Saver (discounted pricing). Production time starts when artwork upload is complete and begins after proof approval. Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.

What are the standard sizes for indoor banner stand replacements?

We offer standard sizes for both Rotatable Stands (36"x62", 36"x78", 40"x75", 48"x72" - all reversible) and Versatile Banner Stands (72"x24", 72"x36", 90"x36"). Custom sizing is available for specific banner stand requirements. Contact customer service for precise measurements and specialty applications.

Do you offer design services for replacement banners?

Yes, our in-house graphic design team creates custom replacement banners. Simply upload any reference materials, photos, or existing artwork along with specific design instructions. You'll receive an email proof for review and approval. This service is perfect for complex designs or when you need professional design assistance.

How do I ensure my replacement banner fits my existing stand?

Select the size that matches your current banner stand specifications. If you need exact measurements for proper fit, our customer service team can help ensure compatibility with your specific banner stand model. We can accommodate custom sizing for precise banner stand requirements.

What's the difference between vinyl and fabric replacement materials?

Vinyl replacements (13oz/15oz scrim) offer maximum durability, easy cleaning, and smooth retraction for frequent use. Fabric replacements (Banner Soft) provide a premium matte finish, reduce glare under indoor lighting, and offer vibrant color reproduction. Both materials include hot knife cut edges to prevent fraying during banner stand operation.

Can I get a proof before my replacement banner is printed?

Yes, we provide digital proofs via email for all orders. Standard proofs include low-resolution artwork preview. Order proofs include artwork, order summary, pricing, and billing information. For color-critical applications, we offer Color Match Proof systems. Production begins only after you approve your proof.

Do you ship replacement banners internationally?

Yes, we ship internationally with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. We currently accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS only. Contact our customer service team for specific international shipping requirements and documentation assistance.

What if my replacement banner arrives damaged?

Damaged goods must be returned for inspection, and we'll send a replacement banner at no additional charge. After packages leave our facilities, shipping company terms and conditions apply. We recommend ordering early to account for potential shipping delays, and tracking numbers are provided for all shipments.
